creator: x.ricci@tiscali.it
text:
thank you much BorichL , "time is a gentleman" , meaning that from 5 years ago till now meantime I had changed pc and went up with system versions; TridentOS switched from BSD to Linux and I wanted to remain in BSD therefore am actually running Freebsd 14.1 , so issue auto-solved since Freebsd 13.0.
Sorry if I then forgot to close the ticket, doing it now.
Thank you again
